texto: Is it love? I don’t know,” he said truthfully. “Sometimes I think I’m just addicted to him. Or that he’s cast some kind of horrible curse on me where I’m to follow him for the rest of my life, doomed to fall for his lies over and over again.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Bey Deckard que provoca vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. Ao questionar “Is it love? I don’t know,” he said truthfully. “Sometimes I think I’m just addicted to him. Or th…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, feelings, truthfully, com foco em reflexao.

frase_original: Is it love? I don’t know,” he said truthfully. “Sometimes I think I’m just addicted to him. Or that he’s cast some kind of horrible curse on me where I’m to follow him for the rest of my life, doomed to fall for his lies over and over again.
